task: F10 falsification close — hexa-lang AOT codegen bare-call map_* builtin support + A17/A18/A19 AOT swap
f10_root_cause: codegen_c2.hexa (SSOT) emitted hexa_call2(map_contains_key, ...) for bare-call form — only the method form (tbl.contains_key) had a special-case emit; no runtime symbol exists for the indirect-call dispatch, so clang aborted with use-of-undeclared-identifier (10 errors on A18, 12 on A17, 1 on A19).

raw_9_jurisdiction: codegen_c2.hexa is hexa-lang self-host source (SSOT); hexa_cc.c is a hexa_v2-emitted derivative. raw 9 hexa-only does not apply (C is generated, not hand-written; hand-patching would FALSIFY the self-host fixpoint).
emit_logic_dry: Mirrors method form. map_size = hexa_int(hexa_len(m)); map_delete aliases hexa_map_remove (no separate runtime symbol).

runtime_unavailable_skipped: No skipped builtins — runtime.c covers hexa_map_keys/values/entries/contains_key/get/set/remove. hexa_map_size and hexa_map_delete have no dedicated runtime symbols, so codegen synthesizes them via hexa_int(hexa_len(m)) and hexa_map_remove respectively. This is the honest C3: map_size and map_delete are codegen-synthesized aliases, NOT first-class runtime functions.

method: hexa cc --regen run twice; v3 captured between runs
note: Compiler binary hexa_v2 rebuilt from regenerated hexa_cc.c (clang -O2). Re-running hexa cc --regen with the new hexa_v2 produces byte-identical hexa_cc.c.new — confirms f(C)=C still holds across the codegen extension.

output: size=3 has_a=true has_x=false get_b=2 nkeys=3 nvals=3 nentries=3 after_remove_size=2 after_delete_size=1

note: All 4 AOT measurements ≪ 500 ms/KB ceiling. The two-axis dichotomy from raw 137 strengthening is now resolved on AOT: F-A18-3 retired on the production-relevant axis.

AOT swap does NOT change saving% — semantic equivalence. F-A18-1 remains an orthogonal compression-quality axis blocking full DEPLOYABLE; closure path is algorithmic (PPM frequency model + LZ chain depth + dict pre-warm), not toolchain.
raw_91_honest_c3: AOT swap closes F-A18-3 latency, NOT F-A18-1 saving. Reporting only the latency win without disclosing F-A18-1 status would be a category error — both axes are required for DEPLOYABLE.
